provisions.title: Full text
provisions.content:
MOTOR ROUTE BUSES

[L.S.65.01

LE{ISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 65.01
REGOLAMENTI DWAR IL-MOTOR ROUTE BUSES
26 ta’ Novembru, 1948
IN-NOTIFIKAZZJONI TAL-GVERN 743 tal-1948, kif emendata blAvvi\i Legali 98 tal-1959, 166 tal-1990 u 150 tal-2009; u bl-Att XV tal2009.

Revokati bl-Avvi\ Legali 254 tal-2011.
